title: goodenia prostrata
intro: Goodenia prostrata, also known as low goodenia or low goodenia violet, is a low-growing, spreading Australian native plant belonging to the Goodenia genus. Traditionally, Goodenia prostrata has been used in Australian bush medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against microbial infections. Goodenia prostrata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
